bio:
Hi, I’m Johannes 👋
I’m a Berlin-based web developer who enjoys building things together with other curious and motivated people. I’m especially interested in open source projects, modern web development, and collaborative software work where ideas are shared openly and everyone learns from each other.

I like working on clean, practical solutions and enjoy discussing architecture, tooling, and best practices just as much as writing code. I’m comfortable communicating in English and value friendly, respectful teamwork.

If you’re looking for someone who’s reliable, curious, and happy to contribute to meaningful team projects, I’d love to connect 🚀
UX designer looking for creative teams
Full-stack developer with focus on React and Node.js

Hi, I’m Alice Jones! I’m a project manager with solid agile experience, and I love guiding teams toward smooth, successful outcomes 📈🤝. Yoga and Pilates keep me grounded and energized, and I never miss a chance to roll out my mat 🧘‍♀️✨. I also enjoy cycling and exploring new routes around the city—nothing beats fresh air and a good ride 🚴‍♀️🌿.

I’m passionate about personal growth and always excited to learn new skills or try new hobbies 🌟. Friends often describe me as organized, optimistic, and great at bringing people together. Whether it’s a project, a workout, or a creative idea, I love collaborating with others who share positive energy and curiosity 💛.

I’m a mobile developer specializing in React Native, with a strong interest in building reliable, user-friendly apps that work smoothly across platforms. I enjoy turning ideas into clean, maintainable code and continuously improving my skills in modern software development.

Outside of coding, I’m really into home cooking and meal prep—planning, experimenting, and keeping things practical and efficient, both in the kitchen and in code.

I enjoy collaborating with others, communicating in English, and contributing to projects where quality, teamwork, and thoughtful solutions matter 📱🚀

Hi, I’m Anna 👋
I’m a frontend developer specializing in React, with a strong passion for user experience design. I enjoy creating interfaces that are not only visually appealing but also intuitive and pleasant to use. Clean code, thoughtful components, and attention to detail are what I care about most.

When I’m not working on UI concepts or refining frontend logic, you’ll likely find me baking (cookies included 🍪), experimenting with healthy home cooking, or unwinding with a Pilates session.

I enjoy collaborating in teams, communicating in English, and contributing to projects where technology, design, and creativity come together ✨

Hi, I am Anne Marie from Mainz, Germany. I love long runs along the Rhine, relaxed Pilates sessions, and anything that combines movement with good conversation. I am looking for running partners and training buddies in the Rhein-Main area to share routes, set goals, and keep each other motivated.
Full-stack developer with a passion for music, art, and languages

Hi, I am Stephanie, a curious and social person who enjoys meeting new people from different backgrounds. I love learning languages, trying new cafés, and joining mixed work-and-leisure projects. I am here to find teams for small creative projects, language exchange, and relaxed social activities after work.

Hi, I am Susan and I am genuinely passionate about fresh fruit, healthy food, and creative cooking. I like experimenting with smoothies, plant-based recipes, and colorful brunch ideas. I am looking for people who enjoy food, markets, and relaxed meetups to cook, chat, and share new recipe ideas together.

Hi, I’m Anna Albers and I live in beautiful Berlin-Köpenick 🌿✨. I love cycling through the forests and along the rivers here, always looking for new routes to explore 🚴‍♀️💨. Gardening is my other big passion—I enjoy growing vegetables, experimenting with new plants, and getting my hands in the soil 🥕🌱.

If you’re interested in cycling tours or want to exchange tips about vegetable gardening, feel free to reach out. I’m always happy to connect with fellow outdoor enthusiasts 🤝🌼.

Hello, I am Julia, an enthusiastic cyclist who loves exploring new routes in and around the city. I enjoy weekend rides, scenic tours, and combining sport with good conversation and coffee stops. I am looking for teammates for regular cycling sessions and small outdoor adventures after work or on weekends.

Hi, I am Anne, working in a creative field and always happy to connect with friendly and open-minded people. I enjoy board games, cozy café meetups, and small side projects where people can learn from each other. I am looking for teammates for casual social activities, coworking sessions, and light creative collaborations.

Hey, I am Hannes, a software tester who enjoys breaking things in a helpful way and making products better. In my free time I like making music, going to small concerts, and trying out new tools and apps. I am here to find people for tech-related side projects, feedback rounds, and relaxed music or meetup sessions.

This is a test account used for exploring and trying out features on Lomir. I am marked as a general all-rounder, open to any kind of team, project, or activity. Feel free to invite this profile for demos, onboarding tests, or safe experiments with new ideas and team setups.
Professional photographer specializing in portrait and event photography.

Hi, I am Johannes, a digital professional who enjoys combining meaningful work with a balanced social life. I like exploring new cities, meeting people for language exchange, and joining small side projects in tech and design. I am looking for teams and partners for international collaboration, casual coworking, and cultural or outdoor activities in my area.
Technical writer and content creator focused on software documentation.
Freshly graduated web developer passionate about music, art, languages, and movies.
Hello! I am Julia from Mainz. I love hiking, exploring nature and web development. Currently, I am working on the team-up app Lomir.
Frontend developer from Stockholm who loves clean UI design, fika breaks, and collaborative coding sessions. I enjoy biking around the city and joining small creative side projects.
Outdoor enthusiast and software tester in Bergen. I love hiking, fjord trips, and relaxed co-op gaming sessions. Always happy to join small tech projects or nature adventures.
UX designer passionate about human-centered design, cycling culture, and cozy meetups. I enjoy exploring cafés in Copenhagen and joining creative collaboration sessions.
Full-stack developer from Helsinki who enjoys sauna evenings, winter sports, and building meaningful tools. Looking for coding meetups, language exchanges, and outdoor adventures.
Community-oriented creator from Reykjavík who loves photography, hiking volcanic landscapes, and hosting small social meetups. I enjoy connecting people and sharing adventures.
Product designer from Paris who loves turning complex ideas into simple interfaces. In the evenings I experiment with bistro-style recipes and host cozy dinner meetups.
Software engineer based in Lyon. I enjoy clean code, slow cooked stews, local wine, and relaxed game nights with good food on the table.
Community manager and food blogger from Marseille. Always searching for fresh ingredients, street food gems, and people who like to cook, eat, and create content together.
Cloud developer in Toulouse who relaxes by baking bread, brioche, and croissants. Open for weekend baking sessions, coffee tastings, and tech side projects.
UX researcher living in Bordeaux. I love user interviews, natural wines, cheese pairings, and exploring small cafés or farmers markets with others.
Product designer from Sao Paulo who loves street food, illustration and working on small community apps. Looking for people to co-create things and explore the city together.
Software developer from Rio de Janeiro who enjoys beach volleyball, live music and weekend hackathons. Happy to join remote projects and local meetups.
Journalist from Buenos Aires who loves book clubs, documentary nights and long city walks. Looking for teams around writing, languages and culture.
Engineering student in Santiago who enjoys hiking in the Andes, photography and tinkering with hardware projects after class.
Community organiser from Bogota who loves hosting potlucks, language exchanges and small learning circles about social impact.
Full-stack developer in Vancouver who enjoys hiking, board games and building tools for small communities.

Data analyst in Toronto who enjoys running by the lake, meetup talks about AI and relaxed pub quizzes.
Teacher living in Halifax who loves book clubs, coastal walks and learning new languages with patient partners.
Game developer in Calgary who enjoys climbing gyms, local game jams and testing prototypes with friendly people. Also love golfing :)
Remote worker living in Anchorage who loves winter sports, cozy board game nights and online coworking.
Photographer based in Fairbanks, into northern lights, hiking and sharing road trip stories.
Community nurse in Juneau who enjoys knitting, baking for friends and gentle hikes on free weekends.
IT support specialist living in Sitka who enjoys fishing, co-op games and quiet online study groups.
Freelance writer in Homer who loves sea views, writing circles and slow creative mornings in cafés.
